description:
A refined all-in-one Stremio build for premium viewing: modern UI with enhanced metadata, intro skipping, smart automation and optional enhancements—all optimized for modest hardware.


Changelog
Hotfix
- Fixed sidebar auto-hide bug - Clicking the search bar no longer prevents left sidebar from auto-hiding
- Fixed media title fade - Player media title now properly fades out as intended
- Fixed player subtitle selection menu weird outline on round elements
Note
For users on v4.5.0: This hotfix includes all v4.6.0 features (keyboard & gamepad support). You can download v4.6.2 directly for the complete update - no need to install v4.6.0 update separately.
